name: Anker 777 Thunderbolt 4 Dock (12-in-1)
shortDescription: The Anker 777 is the best Thunderbolt 4 dock for Windows mini PC users — 12 ports, 90W charging, triple 4K display support, and Ethernet in a compact form factor at $199.
useCases: Single-cable docking for GEEKOM, KAMRUI, and Windows mini PCs
Connecting multiple USB-A peripherals to Thunderbolt-only hosts
SD card and Ethernet for mobile workstation setups
pros: Best value Thunderbolt 4 dock for Windows mini PC users
Triple 4K display support — more than most docks at this price
Compact vertical design fits tight desk setups
cons: Only Gigabit Ethernet — not 2.5GbE like CalDigit TS4
12 ports vs 18 on TS4 — fewer USB-A slots
Vertical stand can tip if cables pull from one side
verdict: The Anker 777 is the best Thunderbolt 4 dock under $200. It hits the sweet spot for GEEKOM, KAMRUI, and other Windows mini PC users who need triple monitors, USB-A expansion, and 90W charging without paying CalDigit TS4 prices. The Gigabit Ethernet limitation matters only if you have a 2.5GbE NAS — otherwise, this is the easy recommendation for Windows mini PC owners.

faq.question: Does the Anker 777 work with GEEKOM mini PCs?
faq.answer: Yes. GEEKOM AI A7 Max and IT12 both have Thunderbolt 4 ports. The Anker 777 connects via the included Thunderbolt 4 cable and delivers power, displays, USB-A ports, Ethernet, and SD card simultaneously. One cable replaces a multi-hub setup.

faq.question: Can the Anker 777 drive three 4K monitors?
faq.answer: Yes, on compatible hosts. Using the Thunderbolt 4 downstream port plus the two DisplayPort outputs, you can run three 4K displays. Host GPU support required — Windows mini PCs with Intel Iris Xe or AMD Radeon graphics handle three displays natively.

faq.question: Is the Anker 777 compatible with Mac Mini?
faq.answer: Yes. The Anker 777 works with Mac Mini M4 and M4 Pro. Charging pass-through at 90W works. Note the Mac Mini already has its own power supply, so the 90W charging primarily matters for MacBook users.

notFor: Users needing 2.5GbE — only Gigabit Ethernet included
Those needing more than 12 ports — consider CalDigit TS4
entityHeadline: Anker 777 Thunderbolt 4 Dock Review: Best Windows Mini PC Dock Under $200
